query: SELECT id, slug, title, CASE WHEN content LIKE '%editpdf%' OR content LIKE '%pdfe.com%' THEN 'YES' ELSE 'NO' END as has_old_domain, CASE WHEN metaTitle LIKE '%editpdf%' OR metaTitle LIKE '%pdfe.com%' THEN 'YES' ELSE 'NO' END as meta_has_old, CASE WHEN metaDescription LIKE '%editpdf%' OR metaDescription LIKE '%pdfe.com%' THEN 'YES' ELSE 'NO' END as metadesc_has_old FROM blog_posts;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4AvtuQasrcUbqPZ.root --database HUwJ6fxw58gKVZz5QkmFWk --execute SELECT id, slug, title, CASE WHEN content LIKE '%editpdf%' OR content LIKE '%pdfe.com%' THEN 'YES' ELSE 'NO' END as has_old_domain, CASE WHEN metaTitle LIKE '%editpdf%' OR metaTitle LIKE '%pdfe.com%' THEN 'YES' ELSE 'NO' END as meta_has_old, CASE WHEN metaDescription LIKE '%editpdf%' OR metaDescription LIKE '%pdfe.com%' THEN 'YES' ELSE 'NO' END as metadesc_has_old FROM blog_posts;
